## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (if touched routing / RSC / config)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated (if conventions or structure changed)
- [ ] ADR added/updated (if architectural)
- [ ] Migration reviewed (if schema changed)
- [ ] Tested at 360px (mobile) and 1440px (laptop) — both look intentional, not stretched
